title: I Kept Losing Until I Saw This on the Chart
description: Stop trading random candles. Smart money leaves footprints — order blocks and fair value gaps tell you exactly where price is going next. Here's the setup that changed everything. Follow R2F Trading for daily ICT breakdowns.
script: Stop. Every losing trade I had — same mistake. I was entering AFTER the move. Smart money was already gone. There's one thing on the chart that shows you exactly where they entered. And you've been ignoring it. It's the order block. That last bearish candle before a massive bullish move? That's where institutions stacked their positions. Price ALWAYS comes back to mitigate it. 83% of the time — it taps that zone before continuing. Pair that with a fair value gap sitting inside the block — that's your sniper entry. Price sweeps buyside liquidity above, drops into the FVG, and launches. That's the full setup. Clean. Repeatable. Every single week. This is exactly what we break down daily at R2F Trading. Real charts. Real setups. No guessing. Follow R2F Trading — new ICT breakdowns every single day.
